pusher_settings.app_cluster_help: The cluster your Pusher app is hosted in (for example eu or us2), shown on the app's "App Keys" page. Leave blank if you set a custom server hostname below.
pusher_settings.app_id_help: The numeric App ID from your Pusher app's "App Keys" page.
pusher_settings.app_key_help: The public key from your Pusher app's "App Keys" page. It is sent to browsers, so it is not secret.
pusher_settings.app_secret_help: The private secret from your Pusher app's "App Keys" page. Keep this confidential — it is only used server-side.
pusher_settings.server_hostname_help: Optional. Override the host the client connects to, for a self-hosted Pusher-compatible server (for example soketi). Leave blank to use Pusher's hosted service with the cluster above.
pusher_settings.title: Pusher Settings

discussion_list.show_updates_text: {count, plural, one {Show # updated discussion} other {Show # updated discussions}}
